title: Add --make json to enable integration with non-make/cmake build systems
body:
This PR adds `--make json` option which enables users to output JSON file describing what was verilated, what options were used and where is the result (names of output files). That greatly helps to integrate verilated files into alternative build system(s). The example output is at the bottom of this PR description.

This feature was developed as part of a small hobby project, and I would be happy to contribute it to a community project.

The code has been tested on both non-hierarchical and hierarchical projects. As part of this feature, the cmake generator has been reworked to use a JSON file as input to generate cmake files. This requires cmake version 3.19 and is compatible with Ubuntu 22.04+. Ubuntu 20.04 should update cmake itself.

Example JSON output:
```
{
	"system": {
		"perl": "perl",
		"python3": "python3",
		"verilator_root": "/home/user/verilator",
		"verilator_solver": ""
	},

	"options": {
		"cflags": [],
		"ldflags": [],
		"system_c": false,
		"coverage": false,
		"use_timing": false,
		"threads": 1,
		"trace": "vcd"
	},

	"sources": {
		"global": [
			"/home/user/verilator/include/verilated.cpp",
			"/home/user/verilator/include/verilated_vcd_c.cpp",
			"/home/user/verilator/include/verilated_threads.cpp"
		],

		"classes_slow": [
			"/home/user/project/dbg/gen/hdl/Vatan2___024root__Slow.cpp",
			"/home/user/project/dbg/gen/hdl/Vatan2___024root__DepSet_h698f8792__0__Slow.cpp",
			"/home/user/project/dbg/gen/hdl/Vatan2___024root__DepSet_ha9ce0fcb__0__Slow.cpp"
		],

		"classes_fast": [
			"/home/user/project/dbg/gen/hdl/Vatan2.cpp",
			"/home/user/project/dbg/gen/hdl/Vatan2___024root__DepSet_h698f8792__0.cpp",
			"/home/user/project/dbg/gen/hdl/Vatan2___024root__DepSet_ha9ce0fcb__0.cpp"
		],

		"support_slow": [
			"/home/user/project/dbg/gen/hdl/Vatan2__Syms.cpp",
			"/home/user/project/dbg/gen/hdl/Vatan2__Trace__0__Slow.cpp",
			"/home/user/project/dbg/gen/hdl/Vatan2__TraceDecls__0__Slow.cpp"
		],

		"support_fast": [
			"/home/user/project/dbg/gen/hdl/Vatan2__Trace__0.cpp"
		],

		"deps": [
			"/home/user/project/hdl/atan2.v",
			"/home/user/verilator/bin/verilator_bin",
			"/home/user/verilator/include/verilated_std.sv",
			"/home/user/verilator/include/verilated_std_waiver.vlt"
		],

		"user_classes": [
		]
	}
}
```
